name: Lemon Poinsettia Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) Margarine or Butter, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, shortening, margarine or butter, and lemon extract.
3. Add egg to the mixture and stir until combined.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and salt, stirring until well mixed.
5. Roll half of the dough at a time into rounds about 1/4 inch thick on a lightly floured surface.
6. Cut with a 3-inch round or scalloped cutter.
7. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Allow the cookies to cool slightly, then remove from the cookie sheet and place on a wire rack to cool completely.
10. Spread about two teaspoons of cream cheese spread over each cooled cookie.
11. Arrange mint leaves and sliced strawberries on top of the cream cheese to resemble poinsettias.
12. Refrigerate any remaining cookies. Approximately 2 1/2 dozen cookies will be made.
